steps.title: Set up the percentage equation
steps.content:
We know that 75% of items are faulty and there are 96 faulty items. This relationship is:
$$0.75 \times \text{Total} = 96$$

steps.title: Solve for total items
steps.content:
Divide both sides by 0.75:
$$\text{Total} = \frac{96}{0.75} = \frac{96}{\frac{3}{4}} = 96 \times \frac{4}{3} = \frac{384}{3} = 128$$
The sample contains 128 total items.
